metadata.title: Estoril Praia Analytics Hub
metadata.description: Analytics dashboard for Grupo Desportivo Estoril Praia.

home.noData: No synced data yet. Set `DATABASE_URL` and `FOOTBALL_DATA_API_KEY` and run the sync — see the "About the Data" page.

squad.title: Squad
squad.intro: Current players of Grupo Desportivo Estoril Praia.
squad.noData: The squad isn't available yet. The football-data.org free tier doesn't include this data for this competition — see the "About the Data" page for details. This page is ready for whenever that data exists, whether via the API or manual entry.

clubHistory.title: History
clubHistory.intro: Historical milestones of Grupo Desportivo Estoril Praia, since its founding in 1939. Manual dataset, cross-checked against the Portuguese and English Wikipedia — see the "About the Data" page.

founding.title: Founding
founding.description: Founded on 17 May 1939 as Grupo Desportivo Estoril Plage, out of the Sociedade Estoril-Plage. The club's yellow and blue colours represent the region's sun and sea — the origin of the "Canarinhos" ("Canaries") nickname.

cupFinal1944.title: Taça de Portugal finalists
cupFinal1944.description: Reached the Taça de Portugal final, lost 8–0 to Benfica.

debut1945.title: Top-flight debut
debut1945.description: Debut season in the top division, finishing 7th.

relegation1953.title: Relegated from the top flight
relegation1953.description: Relegated from the top division, beginning more than two decades in the regional divisions.

return1976.title: Return to the top flight
return1976.description: Returned to the top division after more than 20 years in the lower tiers.

title2004.title: Liga de Honra champions
title2004.description: Won the Liga de Honra (second division) title, earning promotion to the Primeira Liga.

relegation2005.title: Relegated again
relegation2005.description: Relegated to the second division after a single season back in the Primeira Liga.

title2012.title: Liga de Honra champions again
title2012.description: Won the Liga de Honra again, with Marco Silva named the competition's Coach of the Year, earning promotion to the Primeira Liga.

european2013.title: European qualification
european2013.description: Finished 5th in the Primeira Liga, securing qualification for European competition.

bestFinish2014.title: Best-ever finish
bestFinish2014.description: The club's best-ever Primeira Liga finish — 4th place — and its first appearance in a European competition (UEFA Europa League).

title2021.title: Liga Portugal 2 champions
title2021.description: Won the Liga Portugal 2 title, earning a return to the Primeira Liga.

cupRunnerUp2024.title: Taça da Liga runners-up
cupRunnerUp2024.description: Runners-up in the Taça da Liga.

aboutData.title: About the Data
aboutData.intro: This project was built as a portfolio piece and combines real data — fetched via API and entered manually — with experimental sections that are clearly labelled whenever the data is simulated.

sources.standings: Standings, results and fixtures — football-data.org (free tier), via REST API.
sources.squad: Squad and basic player stats — football-data.org.
sources.history: Club history — manual dataset, built from public sources (Wikipedia, official site).
sources.marketValues: Market values — occasional manual entry, sourced from Sofascore or FBref (never Transfermarkt, due to its terms of use).

aboutData.updateFrequency: Standings, results and squad data are synced by a scheduled task (Vercel Cron Job) that runs once a day and writes the results into the project's own database. The site never calls the external API directly on each visit, to respect the free tier's rate limits.
aboutData.limitations: The football-data.org free tier has request-per-minute limits, doesn't include the full squad (players) for Liga Portugal, and may not include every match event (goals, cards, substitutions) for every competition. Some historical or financial data is only updated manually and occasionally.
aboutData.simulatedData: Any artificially generated advanced metric (e.g. fatigue, GPS, wearables) is clearly flagged with a "Simulated data" notice in the interface and is never presented as real.
